title: Smoky American Goat Wrap
description: A smoky and velvety post-workout American dish featuring goat meat, double-fry KFC style, and wrapped in a lotus leaf, following ayurvedic sattvic friendly principles.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground goat meat, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a small patty.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat and double fry the patties until they are golden brown and cooked through.
Wrap each patty in a lotus leaf and bake in the oven for 10 minutes.
Serve the smoky American goat wraps hot and enjoy.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
